questionHtml: An electrolytic cell was set up using inert electrodes and a dilute aqueous solution of magnesium chloride, MgCl2 (aq).
markschemeHtml:
electron flow from anode to battery OR from battery to cathode ✓

Mg2+/H+ ions to − electrode
AND
Cl−/OH− ions to + electrode ✓

Do not award M1 if electrons are shown in electrolyte.
